title: Steam N' Scrolls
body:
# 🔮 Steam N’ Scrolls — Spellcraft and Gearwork, in One Living World

Steam N’ Scrolls blends fantasy exploration, spellcasting and steampunk tech into one immersive experience.  
Built for long-term survival or multiplayer co-op, it brings together stunning terrain, magical progression, kinetic machines, and a reactive world, all tuned for performance and vibe.

![banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/106bead0df683001ef40f480987aace99b0127ff.jpeg)

## 🌍 EXPLORE A WORLD THAT FEELS HANDCRAFTED

Every corner of the world feels alive, thanks to a combination of expansive worldgen and detailed structures.  
From the caves and mountains of **Tectonic** and the numerous biomes of **Regions Unexplored** to the ancient towers and strongholds scattered by **Dungeons Arise**, exploration is both rewarding and visually rich. Villages, ruins, and taverns feel like part of a story, not just decoration.

---

## ✨ CAST SPELLS THAT EVOLVE WITH YOU

Magic in Steam N’ Scrolls is more than flashy effects, it's a real system with depth.  
With **Ars Nouveau**, you can build custom spells and automate with arcane machines. **Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks** adds fast-paced combat casting with a mana system that matters.  
Whether you play a scholar, summoner or battle mage, the tools are here to support your style.

---

## ⚙️ BUILD WITH MECHANICAL ELEGANCE

Tech is powered by motion, not menus.  
**Create** and its addons let you build everything from harvesters to cannons, using gears, belts and steam.  
It’s complex if you want it to be, but also intuitive and satisfying, especially when combined with farming and cooking systems like **Farmer’s Delight**.

---

## 🏗️ EXPRESS YOURSELF THROUGH BUILDING

With blocks from **Chipped** and **Fantasy Furniture**, you can create detailed interiors, thematic towns, or cozy magical homes. With **Axiom**, you can shape the landscape the way you want it to be and make building not only functionnal, but part of the fantasy.
There’s plenty of room for roleplay, aesthetic bases, or large settlements that feel lived-in.

---

## 🐉 A WORLD FILLED WITH LIFE

From the smallest birds to legendary dragons, the world of Steam N’ Scrolls is teeming with creatures that make every biome feel alive.  
**Naturalist** and **Alex’s Mobs** bring rich ecosystems to forests, coasts and caves, from curious otters to giant bears and vibrant songbirds.  
And lurking deeper in the wild, **Ice and Fire** adds mythic beasts like cyclops, sea serpents, and dragons guarding ancient hoards.  
Combined with enhanced sound design and visual ambience, the game feels like a world that reacts, breathes, and challenges you to survive in it.

## 📝 Personnal Note

This pack was originally created for yet another two weeks phase with my friends. I felt like it could be cool to share it so other people could enjoy it! I'll try my best to make it more and more enjoyable as we go. And yes, it also has some goofy mods.
